query: I just signed up for Cloudflare R2 and got my API keys. My account ID is 8a3f... something. Can you help me set up the AWS CLI so I can start uploading images from my photography site?

we need to move about 200GB of user-uploaded avatars from our old S3 bucket in us-west-2 to a new R2 bucket. already have rclone configured for both. whats the fastest way and how do i make sure nothing got lost?

my react app at https://app.example.com needs to upload files directly to our R2 bucket but im getting CORS errors. the bucket is called user-uploads and i have wrangler installed. also need presigned download URLs for the files
I have a MinIO server running on my homelab at 192.168.1.50:9000 and I want to configure rclone to sync my Documents folder to it every night via cron. Can you help set that up?

aws s3 sync keeps failing with 'An error occurred (AccessDenied)' when I try to upload to my Backblaze B2 bucket. I'm using profile b2 with endpoint https://s3.us-west-004.backblazeb2.com. What am I doing wrong?
I need to generate a presigned URL for a file in my S3 bucket that expires in 24 hours. The bucket is 'client-deliverables' and the file is at reports/q4-2025.pdf. Using default AWS profile.
help me set up lifecycle rules on my aws s3 bucket 'app-logs' so that files older than 90 days move to Glacier and get deleted after 1 year. also want to enable versioning.

I'm comparing Wasabi vs Backblaze B2 vs R2 for storing about 5TB of video archives. Cost is the main concern but I also need to download files occasionally. Which would you recommend and can you help me set up the winner?

can you help me write a bash script that backs up my postgres database, compresses it, and uploads to my DigitalOcean Spaces bucket every day? the spaces region is nyc3 and I already have aws cli configured with profile do-spaces

I want to set up a Cloudflare Worker that serves images from my R2 bucket with caching and image resizing. The bucket is called 'product-images' and I want URLs like images.mystore.com/product-123.webp
Can you help me set up a PostgreSQL database with pgvector for storing embeddings? I need to create a table with a vector column and add an IVFFlat index for similarity search.
I'm trying to deploy my Next.js app to Vercel but the build keeps failing with 'Module not found: Can't resolve @/components/Header'. My tsconfig paths look correct though.

help me write a python script that reads a CSV file, groups the data by department, and generates a summary report with charts using matplotlib. the csv has columns: name, department, salary, start_date
I need to set up nginx as a reverse proxy for my Node.js API running on port 3000. Want SSL with Let's Encrypt and rate limiting. The domain is api.example.com.
my docker compose setup has 3 services - a react frontend, a fastapi backend, and redis for caching. the frontend cant reach the backend, getting network errors. here's my docker-compose.yml...
Can you help me set up GitHub Actions CI/CD for my Go project? I need it to run tests, build the binary, and create a release when I push a tag. Also want to upload the binary as a release asset.
I'm building a REST API with Express.js and need to add JWT authentication. Users should be able to register, login, and access protected routes. Using MongoDB with Mongoose for the user model.
help me configure my Cloudflare DNS records for my domain. I need an A record pointing to my server IP, a CNAME for www, and MX records for Google Workspace email.
I want to set up Terraform to manage my AWS infrastructure. Need a VPC with public and private subnets, an RDS PostgreSQL instance, and an ECS cluster for running my containers.
can you help me write unit tests for my React components using Jest and React Testing Library? I have a LoginForm component that submits credentials and shows validation errors.
